scripts.preinstall: npm run esc:install && npm run esc:login
scripts.install: npm run esc:cologin && npm run copkgs:install
scripts.esc:cologin: esc run pequod/cloud-access/aws-access -- npm run co:login
scripts.co:login: aws codeartifact login --tool npm --region us-east-2 --repository pequod-codeartifact-repo --domain pequod-codeartifact-domain
